summary: Completed e2e testing of new TimeSheet features. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All 7 new pages load and function correctly (Planning, Expenses, Directory, Reports, Invoices, Notifications, Audit).

issues: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - cosmetic only, not blocking functionality

seed_data_creation: Created test expenses via backend tests (TEST_expense_creation, TEST_approve_expense, TEST_reject_expense)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: /api/stats/balances, /api/planning, /api/expenses CRUD, /api/directory, /api/notifications, /api/invoices, /api/audit-logs. Frontend pages all load: Planning (weekly calendar grid), Expenses (summary cards + expense list + approve/reject), Directory (employee cards + search + status), Reports (PDF/Excel download), Invoices (summary + create button), Notifications (notification cards), Audit (log entries). Role-based access working: admin sees all, employee cannot access invoices or audit-logs (403).

backend.api_stats_balances: PASS - Returns vacation_total, vacation_used, vacation_remaining, overtime_hours, telework_days, office_days, onsite_days
backend.api_planning: PASS - Returns employees with daily status and hours in weekly grid format
backend.api_expenses_list: PASS - GET /api/expenses returns list with amount, category, status, user_name
backend.api_directory: PASS - Returns all employees with id, name, email, role, status (office/home/absent)
backend.api_audit_admin: PASS - Admin can view audit logs

frontend.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All menu items visible (Planning, Notes de frais, Annuaire, Rapports, Factures, Notifications, Journal d'audit)
frontend.planning_page: PASS - Weekly calendar grid with employee rows, department filter, week navigation (Aujourd'hui button)
frontend.expenses_page: PASS - Summary cards (Approuve/En attente/Total), expense list with Approuver/Refuser buttons, + Nouvelle note button
frontend.directory_page: PASS - Summary cards (Actifs/Absents/Total), employee cards with email/phone/department, search input, status badges
frontend.reports_page: PASS - Month/Year filters, employee filter (for managers), Rapport PDF + Export Excel buttons
frontend.invoices_page: PASS - Summary cards (Payees/En cours/Total), + Nouvelle facture button, empty state shown
frontend.notifications_page: PASS - Notification cards with type icons (success/error/info), timestamps
frontend.audit_page: PASS - Action log entries (LOGIN, CREATE, UPDATE, etc.) with user names and timestamps
frontend.dashboard_clockin: PASS - Shows Arrivée/Pause/Départ buttons, project selection, weekly stats
